name: compound-engineering
description: Brainstorm, plan, debug, review, and compound learnings with AI agents
author: Kieran Klaassen and Trevin Chow

interface.shortDescription: Brainstorm, plan, debug, review, and compound learnings with AI agents
interface.longDescription: Compound Engineering guides AI agents through the full engineering loop: strategy, ideation, requirements, planning, execution, debugging, review, PR feedback, and captured learnings that make future work easier.
